title: alysicarpus hendersonii
intro: Alysicarpus hendersonii, also known as the Henderson's alysicarpus, is a flowering plant species in the genus Alysicarpus, belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as legumes. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alysicarpus hendersonii include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory agent, to help manage fever and to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used in traditional medicine, where they are either consumed as a decoction or made into a powder for oral administration.
